Availability.description: Availability classification; controls whether the event occupies time.

EventStatus.description: Event status. A cancelled event is a tombstone that occupies no time.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

Interval.description: A half-open interval [start, end) over instants. end must not precede start; a zero-length interval [t, t) denotes the empty set.

ResolvedEvent.description: A resolved event: an id with a half-open [start, end) instant interval and optional status/availability classification.

description: Given a candidate window and a set of resolved events, report the coalesced busy[] blocks and the complementary free[] gaps within the window (half-open [start, end)).

busyAvailabilities.description: Availabilities (other than tentative) that occupy time. Defaults to ["busy", "unavailable"].

treatTentativeAsBusy.description: Whether tentative events occupy time. Defaults to false.

title: check_availability request
